Package
Description
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.messaging
MongoDB specific messaging support for listening to eg.

    TailableCursorRequest.builder(MessageListener<org.bson.Document, ? super T> listener)
    Obtain a shiny new TailableCursorRequest.TailableCursorRequestBuilder and start defining options in this fancy fluent way.
    ChangeStreamRequest.ChangeStreamRequestBuilder<T>
    ChangeStreamRequest.ChangeStreamRequestBuilder.publishTo(MessageListener<com.mongodb.client.model.changestream.ChangeStreamDocument<org.bson.Document>, ? super T> messageListener)
    Set the MessageListener event messages will be published to.

    Set the MessageListener event messages will be published to.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    ChangeStreamRequest(MessageListener<com.mongodb.client.model.changestream.ChangeStreamDocument<org.bson.Document>, ? super T> messageListener, SubscriptionRequest.RequestOptions options)
    Create a new ChangeStreamRequest with options, passing messages to the given MessageListener.
